title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri
writer: Valentine Davies, James A. Michener, Marcel Lebreton
actors: William Holden, Grace Kelly, Fredric March
plot: Set during the Korean War, a Navy fighter pilot must come to terms with with his own ambivalence towards the war and the fear of having to bomb a set of highly defended bridges. The ending of this grim war drama is all tension.
